message.content: [{"type":"GRAMMAR","original":"I go","corrected":"I went","explanation":"昨天发生的事情要用过去时"},{"type":"GRAMMAR","original":"He say","corrected":"He said","explanation":"第三人称且过去发生，用said"},{"type":"GRAMMAR","original":"need finish","corrected":"need to finish","explanation":"need to do something，需要加to"}]
